perks.title: Remote-Friendly
perks.description: Work from anywhere with flexible hours and a hybrid office model.

perks.title: Health Benefits
perks.description: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage for you and your family.

perks.title: Employee Discount
perks.description: 40% off all Bazaar products plus early access to new collections.

perks.title: Growth Opportunities
perks.description: Annual learning budget, mentorship programs, and clear career pathways.

positions.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
positions.description: Build and optimize our ecommerce platform with modern web technologies. You'll work closely with design and product teams to create beautiful, performant shopping experiences.

positions.title: Fashion Buyer — Women's Ready-to-Wear
positions.description: Source and curate our women's collection, negotiate with suppliers, and identify emerging trends. Requires 5+ years of buying experience in fashion retail.

positions.title: Brand Marketing Manager
positions.description: Lead brand campaigns across digital and traditional channels. Develop creative strategies that drive awareness and engagement with our target audience.

positions.title: UX/UI Designer
positions.description: Design intuitive, visually stunning interfaces for our web and mobile platforms. Conduct user research, create prototypes, and collaborate with engineers to ship polished experiences.

positions.title: Retail Store Associate
positions.description: Deliver exceptional in-store experiences, assist customers with styling advice, and maintain visual merchandising standards. Fashion retail experience preferred.
